captainInput: Der Bundesrat unterschrieb den EU-Vertrag bevor Volk und Parlament darüber entschieden haben

job.inviteCodeRetryNote: The first submission attempt without invite code was rejected before job creation. The successful run used inviteCode SELF-TEST and is the only HJ58 live job consumed.

publicDefaultContainment.note: Public/default fetch redacted report markdown, verdict, truth percentage, and confidence. The authenticated admin fetch exposed the internal V2 report data only to admin.

authenticatedAdminResult.resultEnvelopeNote: The public result envelope remains the precutover damaged shell. The internal report markdown is carried as authenticated admin-only job data.

immediateHiddenArtifactEvidence.captureDurabilityNote: Hidden artifacts are process-local. They were inspected immediately after the run; later direct route calls returned 404 after runtime movement, so the durable evidence is the job record plus this recorded inspection summary.

w4gRepairEvidence.priorObservedStop: HJ57 Bundesrat-simple stopped at W4-G source_material_text_oversized with 9 Source Material records and 19216 aggregate bytes.
w4gRepairEvidence.hj58Outcome: The rerun did not stop at W4-G. W5 received 8 source-content packets, the W4-H parent packet was 14176 bytes within the 16384 cap, W5 extracted 4 EvidenceItems, and the internal report writer produced an admin-only draft.

nextRecommendedAction: Pivot from reachability repair to report-quality review of the HJ58 report and existing successful internal Alpha reports. Choose the single next quality bar from observed defects instead of adding another reachability/proof layer.
